meta.analytic_arm: float64 (geometry/A_kink bitwise vs local; Chernoff coefficient matches local to ~1e-3, limited by scipy version 1.13.1 vs 1.10.1)
meta.mc_arm: colab A100 GPU generator, CRN-paired on-orbit AUC (4 corner shards)

frozen.description: Calibration plane of the curvature-tax law; bars preregistered before compute.

definitions.A_traj: A_star / chi (trajectory budget at grid ratio chi)
definitions.C_fit: median(|chernoff_star(DeltaQ_capopt)| / t^4) over the deep-jet t grid
definitions.C0: C_fit of the straight arm (A_traj=0) at the operating point (normaliser)
definitions.A_kink: vertex of a quadratic fit to the raw-cap coefficient(A) V-shape

frozen.note: A failed bar is a reported result, not a retry license (preregistration).
